metaDescription: Magpie — Catch your ideas before they fly away.
title: Magpie
tagline: An idea capture app for wandering minds
intro: Ideas come and go — from podcasts that stop me mid-run, Substacks I never finish, or photos that collect dust in my phone.
If a handful of ideas shape what we see, then I needed a simple way to notice what I notice.
Magpie is an iOS app that collects text, links, voice notes, and photos that catch your attention -- so you can see the ideas you keep circling back to.

waitlist.note: Currently in beta. Say hi if you're curious.
